title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Lucknow. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
